other_observers: Dan Maynard; Not sure who the original finder was, but several saw it as it was around for over a week.
description: Brown body with a lighter brown back. Dark brown feathers going up the back of the birds neck and on the breast. White head and upper throat. Black bill with a yellow tip with a little bit of red near the yellow tip, it also has a yellow-olive pouch. It also has a brown eye. The bill is very large and thr bird overall was pretty large, but smaller than American White Pelican.Behaviors: Mostly just swimming around along the dam, but occasionally flying around and actively feeding, which was diving to try to catch its prey.Call: Didn’t hear itPlumage: Subadult Pacific
